meaning: adv.无法抵抗地,不能压制地
examples: They were irresistibly drawn to each other.
I found myself irresistibly drawn to Steve's world.
She had a charm that men found irresistibly attractive.
It was a simple and irresistibly practical idea from siblings Catherine and David Cook.
Haas is irresistibly sly and rapt as an adolescent whose lustful curiosity turns to love.
